title: Realisium
description: A modpack that aimes to improve your gameplay experience by adding stunnig shaders and epic new terrain generation.
body:
**Loaders**:
Realistium is loaded by the fabric loader on version 1.21.

**Tweaks**:
Realistium try's to improve your minecarft experience through:
-Stunning shaders.
-Enhanced player and entity models.
-Beautiful new terrain generation.
-And much much more.

**Compatibility**:
Realistium is compatible with fabric 1.21 and above.

**Warning**: 
This modpack has a mod that needs you to have a NVidia GPU to work, but if you don't have a NVidia GPU you can stil use this modpack but the mod will not by used by minecarft (chunk loading will not be as optimized as with a NVidia GPU).
